nodes.name: target_encoder
nodes.class_name:
EEGTransformer(
  (patch_embed): PatchEmbed(
    (proj): Conv2d(1, 64, kernel_size=(1, 30), stride=(1, 30))
  )
  (chan_embed): Embedding(62, 64)
  (blocks): ModuleList(
    (0-1): 2 x Block(
      (norm1): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
      (attn): Attention(
        (qkv): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=192, bias=True)
        (proj): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
        (proj_drop): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      )
      (drop_path): Identity()
      (norm2): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
      (mlp): MLP(
        (fc1): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=256, bias=True)
        (act): GELU(approximate='none')
        (fc2): Linear(in_features=256, out_features=64, bias=True)
        (drop): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (norm): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
)

nodes.name: encoder
nodes.class_name:
EEGTransformer(
  (patch_embed): PatchEmbed(
    (proj): Conv2d(1, 64, kernel_size=(1, 30), stride=(1, 30))
  )
  (chan_embed): Embedding(62, 64)

nodes.name: predictor
nodes.class_name:
EEGTransformerPredictor(
  (predictor_embed): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (time_embed): RotaryEmbedding()
  (predictor_blocks): ModuleList(
    (0-1): 2 x Block(
      (norm1): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
      (attn): Attention(
        (qkv): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=192, bias=True)
        (proj): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
        (proj_drop): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      )
      (drop_path): Identity()
      (norm2): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
      (mlp): MLP(
        (fc1): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=256, bias=True)
        (act): GELU(approximate='none')
        (fc2): Linear(in_features=256, out_features=64, bias=True)
        (drop): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (predictor_norm): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
  (predictor_proj): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
)

nodes.name: reconstructor
nodes.class_name:
EEGTransformerReconstructor(
  (reconstructor_embed): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (time_embed): RotaryEmbedding()
  (chan_embed): Embedding(62, 64)
  (reconstructor_blocks): ModuleList(
    (0-3): 4 x Block(
      (norm1): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
      (attn): Attention(
        (qkv): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=192, bias=True)
        (proj): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
        (proj_drop): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      )
      (drop_path): Identity()
      (norm2): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
      (mlp): MLP(
        (fc1): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=256, bias=True)
        (act): GELU(approximate='none')
        (fc2): Linear(in_features=256, out_features=64, bias=True)
        (drop): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (reconstructor_norm): LayerNorm((64,), eps=1e-06, elementwise_affine=True)
  (reconstructor_proj): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=30, bias=True)
)
